note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.structure module functions.

method_groups.moment: moment, moment_plastic, moment_plastic_y, moment_plastic_z, set_moment_plastic, set_moment_plastic_y, set_moment_plastic_z
method_groups.normal: normal_cohesion, normal_dir, normal_disp, normal_friction, normal_gap, normal_state, normal_stiffness, normal_stress, set_normal_cohesion, set_normal_friction, set_normal_gap, set_normal_stiffness
method_groups.shear: set_shear_cohesion, set_shear_flag, set_shear_friction, set_shear_stiffness, shear_cohesion, shear_dir, shear_disp, shear_flag, shear_friction, shear_state, shear_stiffness, shear_stress
method_groups.table: set_table_cohesion, set_table_factor, set_table_friction, table_cohesion, table_factor, table_friction

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the cross-section area of the pile element.

methods.name: axial_yield
methods.description: Get the axial tensile yield strength (force units) of the pile element.

methods.name: component_id
methods.description: Get the Pile component id.

methods.name: connectivity
methods.description: Get the index of the node with component-ID id in the element. A ValueError exception is raised if no node in that element matches.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Delete this structural element.

methods.name: density
methods.description: Get the density of this structural element.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the Pile extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: force
methods.description: Get the force at each end of the pile in the element local system.

methods.name: force_nodal
methods.description: Get the generalized nodal force acting at each end in the global system. The end 1 translational and rotational components are given first.

methods.name: gap
methods.signature: pile.gap() -> ((float, float, float, float), (float, float, float, float))
methods.description: Get the gap components in normal spring at each end of the pile element. The gap forms a rectangular shape in the pile cross-sectional plane, which is defined by the local yz-axes of the pile element node. The gap consists of four values denoting gap size in the positive and negative y- and z-directions. The components are the positive y-direction, negative y-direction, positive z-direction, and negative z-direction, respectively. The gap is always being tracked, but only affects behavior if the normal coupling spring gap-use flag function. The gap values for end 1 are given first.

returns.type: ((float, float, float, float), (float, float, float, float))

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the Pile group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: pile.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the Pile. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this Pile is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the Pile structural element id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: pile.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the Pile is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: length
methods.description: Get the length of the pile element.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Get the uniform applied distributed load acting on the pile element in the local y- and z-directions. The x-component of the return value will always be 0.0.

methods.name: local_system
methods.description: Get local coordinate system of this element as a 3x3 tensor.

methods.name: mark
methods.description: Get the mark flag on the structural element. The structural element logic may modify this flag during command processing and cycling.

methods.name: moi
methods.description: Get the moment of inertia of the pile. This is defined as the moment of inertia with respect to the x-, y-, and z-axes.

methods.name: moment
methods.description: Get the moment at each end of the pile in the element local system.

methods.name: moment_plastic
methods.description: Get the plastic moment capacity in the pile.

methods.name: moment_plastic_y
methods.description: Get the plastic moment capacity in Y in the pile.

methods.name: moment_plastic_z
methods.description: Get the plastic moment capacity in Z in the pile.

methods.name: nodes
methods.signature: pile.nodes() -> tuple of Structural element node objects
methods.description: Get a tuple containing the structural element nodes attached to this elemment.

returns.type: tuple of Structural element node objects

methods.name: normal_cohesion
methods.description: Get the normal coupling spring cohesive strength of the pile element.

methods.name: normal_dir
methods.description: Get the global direction in which the pile element is being loaded by the coupling normal spring at each end.

methods.name: normal_disp
methods.description: Get the displacement in the coupling normal spring at each end of the pile element. Sign convention for normal spring is positive/negative, indicating separation/overlap.

methods.name: normal_friction
methods.description: Get the normal coupling spring friction angle of the pile element.

methods.name: normal_gap
methods.description: Get the normal coupling spring gap-use flag. True denotes gap is on, and False value denotes gap is off.

methods.name: normal_state
methods.description: Get the yield state of the coupling normal spring at each end of the pile element. Return values 0, 1 and 2 denotes never yielded, now yielding, or yielded in the past, respectively.

methods.name: normal_stiffness
methods.description: Get the normal coupling spring stiffness of the pile element.

methods.name: normal_stress
methods.description: Get the stress in the coupling normal spring at each end of the pile element. Sign convention for the normal spring is positive/negative, indicating separation/overlap.

methods.name: perimeter
methods.description: Get the exposed perimeter of the pile element.

methods.name: poisson
methods.description: Get the Poisson’s ratio of the pile element.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the position vector of the element, defined as the element centroid.

methods.name: rockbolt
methods.description: Get a boolean flag of the rockbolt. True denotes the rockbolt flag is on, and False denotes the rockbolt flag is off.

methods.name: set_area
methods.description: Set the cross-section area of the pile element.

methods.name: set_axial_yield
methods.description: Set the axial tensile yield strength (force units) of the pile element.

methods.name: set_density
methods.description: Set the density of this structural element.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the Pile extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: pile.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the Pile group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_load
methods.description: Set the uniform applied distributed load acting on the pile element in the local y- and z-directions. The x-component is ignored on assignment.

methods.name: set_mark
methods.description: Set the mark flag on the structural element. The structural element logic may modify this flag during command processing and cycling.

methods.name: set_moi
methods.description: Set the moment of inertia of the pile. This is defined as the moment of inertia with respect to the x-, y-, and z-axes.

methods.name: set_moment_plastic
methods.description: Set the plastic moment capacity in the pile.

methods.name: set_moment_plastic_y
methods.description: Set the plastic moment capacity in Y in the pile.

methods.name: set_moment_plastic_z
methods.description: Set the plastic moment capacity in Z in the pile.

methods.name: set_normal_cohesion
methods.description: Set the normal coupling spring cohesive strength of the pile element.

methods.name: set_normal_friction
methods.description: Set the normal coupling spring friction angle of the pile element.

methods.name: set_normal_gap
methods.description: Set the normal coupling spring gap-use flag. True denotes gap is on, and False value denotes gap is off.

methods.name: set_normal_stiffness
methods.description: Set the normal coupling spring stiffness of the pile element.

methods.name: set_perimeter
methods.description: Set the exposed perimeter of the pile element.

methods.name: set_poisson
methods.description: Set the Poisson’s ratio of the pile element.

methods.name: set_rockbolt
methods.description: Set a boolean flag of the rockbolt. True denotes the rockbolt flag is on, and False denotes the rockbolt flag is off.

methods.name: set_shear_cohesion
methods.description: Set the shear coupling spring cohesive strength of the pile element.

methods.name: set_shear_flag
methods.description: Set the shear direction incremental confining stress flag. True denotes the flag is on, False denotes the flag is off.

methods.name: set_shear_friction
methods.description: Set the shear coupling spring friction angle of the pile element.

methods.name: set_shear_stiffness
methods.description: Set the shear coupling spring stiffness of the pile element.

methods.name: set_slide
methods.description: Set a boolean flag of slide. True denotes the slide flag is on, and False denotes the slide flag is off.

methods.name: set_slide_tol
methods.description: Set the large-strain sliding tolerance of the pile element.

methods.name: set_strain_failure
methods.description: Set the tensile failure strain (non-dimensional) of the pile element.

methods.name: set_table_cohesion
methods.description: Set the shear direction cohesion strength table name for the pile element.

methods.name: set_table_factor
methods.description: Set the shear direction friction table name for the pile element.

methods.name: set_table_friction
methods.description: Set the shear direction incremental confining stress factor table name for the pile element.

methods.name: set_thermal_expansion
methods.description: Set the thermal-expansion coefficient for the structural element.

methods.name: set_young
methods.description: Set the Youngs modulus of the pile element.

methods.name: shear_cohesion
methods.description: Get the shear coupling spring cohesive strength of the pile element.

methods.name: shear_dir
methods.description: Get the global direction in which the pile element is being loaded by the coupling shear spring at each end.

methods.name: shear_disp
methods.description: Get the displacement in coupling shear spring at each end of the pile element. Sign convention for shear spring is positive/negative with respect to the average axial direction of pile.

methods.name: shear_flag
methods.description: Get the shear direction incremental confining stress flag. True denotes the flag is on, False denotes the flag is off.

methods.name: shear_friction
methods.description: Get the shear coupling spring friction angle of the pile element.

methods.name: shear_state
methods.description: Get the yield state of the coupling shear spring at each end of the pile element. Return a values of 0, 1 and 2 denote never yielded, now yielding, or yielded in the past, respectively.

methods.name: shear_stiffness
methods.description: Get the shear coupling spring stiffness of the pile element.

methods.name: shear_stress
methods.description: Get the stress in coupling shear spring at each end of the pile element. Sign convention for shear spring is positive/negative with respect to the average axial direction of pile.

methods.name: slide
methods.description: Get a boolean flag of slide. True denotes the slide flag is on, and False denotes the slide flag is off.

methods.name: slide_tol
methods.description: Get the large-strain sliding tolerance of the pile element.

methods.name: strain_failure
methods.description: Get the tensile failure strain (non-dimensional) of the pile element.

methods.name: stress_confining
methods.description: Get the confining stress at each end of the pile element. (Negative value is compression.) Stress acts in a plane perpendicular to the pile axis; confining stress is the average of the principal values in this plane.

methods.name: table_cohesion
methods.description: Get the shear direction cohesion strength table name for the pile element.

methods.name: table_factor
methods.description: Get the shear direction friction table name for the pile element.

methods.name: table_friction
methods.description: Get the shear direction incremental confining stress factor table name for the pile element.

methods.name: thermal_expansion
methods.description: Get the thermal-expansion coefficient for the structural element.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this Pile is live.

methods.name: volume
methods.description: Get the volume of the pile element.

methods.name: ydir
methods.description: Get the y-axis of the pile element local system.

methods.name: young
methods.description: Get the Youngs modulus of the pile element.
